# Design Specification

## 1. Canvas Format
- **Format**: ppt169 (1280x720)
- **Orientation**: Landscape

## 2. Page Count
- **Total Pages**: 10
- **Range**: 1 cover + 1 TOC + 6 content + 1 chapter + 1 ending

## 3. Target Audience
- **Primary**: Enterprise executives, CTOs, technology decision makers
- **Characteristics**: Time-constrained, value data-driven insights, prefer actionable conclusions

## 4. Style Goals
- **Tone**: Professional, forward-looking, authoritative yet accessible
- **Visual Density**: Medium - balanced whitespace with informative content
- **Data Emphasis**: Highlight key statistics and trend projections

## 5. Color Scheme
- **Primary**: Deep blue (#1a1a2e), tech blue (#0066cc)
- **Accent**: Electric blue (#00d4ff), warm gray (#6b7280)
- **Background**: Light gradient (white to light gray)
- **Text**: Dark charcoal (#1f2937) for body, white for dark sections

## 6. Icon Usage
- **Style**: Tabler Outline - clean, professional line icons
- **Density**: Moderate - use icons to enhance visual hierarchy
- **Placement**: Section headers, key points, data callouts

## 7. Typography Plan
- **Headings**: Sans-serif, bold, 36-48pt equivalent
- **Body**: Sans-serif, regular, 18-24pt equivalent
- **Hierarchy**: Clear visual distinction between title, subtitle, body

## 8. Image Strategy
- **Cover**: Abstract AI/neural network visualization
- **Content Pages**: Minimal - focus on charts and diagrams
- **Data Visualization**: Clean charts with gradient fills
- **AI Generation**: Not required for this presentation

## 9. Content Outline

### Page 1: Cover
- Title: 2026 年人工智能发展趋势
- Subtitle: 面向企业决策者的战略洞察
- Visual: Abstract neural network background

### Page 2: Table of Contents
- 6 key trend areas

### Page 3: 大模型进化方向
- Smaller, more efficient models
- Domain-specific LLMs
- Reasoning capabilities

### Page 4: 多模态 AI 应用
- Text + image + audio integration
- Real-time video understanding
- Enterprise use cases

### Page 5: AI 与行业融合
- Healthcare diagnostics
- Financial services automation
- Manufacturing optimization

### Page 6: 边缘 AI 部署
- On-device inference
- Privacy-preserving AI
- Latency reduction

### Page 7: AI 安全与治理
- Regulatory frameworks
- Bias mitigation
- Transparency requirements

### Page 8: 人才与组织变革
- AI literacy programs
- Human-AI collaboration
- Workforce reskilling

### Page 9: 投资与市场展望
- Market size projections
- Key investment areas
- Risk considerations

### Page 10: Ending
- Key takeaways
- Call to action
- Contact information
